Different witches. Different fantasies. Different kinds of trouble.


A collection of standalone Harry Potter stories featuring romance, smut, unlikely pairings, forbidden attractions, and plenty of bad decisions.

In her married life, Hermione isn't ready to be a mother, no matter how much Ron presses to start a family. In a burlesque muggle club, Severus is getting wasted, in memory of the Masters that no longer rule his life. In his small attic flat, their affair begins.

Located: Harry Potter » Het - Male/Female » Ron/Hermione

Hermione isn't 100% happy with her sex life with Ron, and Ron feels insecure about keeping her contented. So, they swing partners with the happily married Draco and Astoria. That was bound to fix everything.

A crack-treated-seriously sex comedy oneshot begining with Hermione having a wet dream about Draco Malfoy, even though she's very much in love with Ron.

Located: HP Canon Characters paired with Original Characters » Het - Male/Female

Clara Henshaw is Albus’ former student. About a year after Voldemort's downfall in Godric's Hollow, she returns from abroad and seeks a job in Hogwarts. She finds England and her former beloved teacher in the calm between wars. Memories and nostalgia bring them together, and for how long can the headmaster resist?

Angst COMPLETE Fingering HC HJ MF OC

We enter our third book with Helen and gang! But look, a title that doesn't match the originals! We are going futher from what is known. So strap in as we discover some of the history of Hogwarts and see what will unfold with our dastardly villian! HP/GW *Books will stay SFW until our characters get a little older*

Helen Potter and the Philosopher's Stone *YEAR ONE* -:- By: Druid
calendar_add_on Published: Jun 23, 2026
update Updated: Jun 29, 2026
star Rated: SFW
book Chapters: 15
rate_review Reviews: 0
visibility Views: 457
recommend Recommendations: 0
menu_book Currently Reading: 0
Located: Harry Potter » General

*COMPLETE* What if. Its a question we ask often. In my return to the world of fanfiction we ask that question. What if Harry had been born a girl? What if Helen had a very different life? What if the wizarding worl actually tried to grow in the wake of Voldmeort. This is book one of a series that will follow Helen Potter and friends as they live their life while experiencing their seven years of Hogwarts and much more. Be ready to wait for it, because we will follow our heroes for a long time before we get to the good stuff. *First book of the Helen Potter Saga*

Content Tags:
Angst COMPLETE NoSex OC

menu_book Currently Reading: 1
Located: Harry Potter » Het - Male/Female » Harry/Hermione

Hermione thought she was marrying a successful provider, but the gold ring on her finger unlocked a monster. Harry is a brutal sadist who demands complete submission, and Hermione is shocked to find her own body betraying her by craving the pain he inflicts. Tonight, with the house completely to themselves while her daughters are out, Harry wastes no time demanding his "wifely duty." From a stinging leather strap to a rough, dominant encounter, Hermione yields entirely to his animalistic urges. But a dark, passing remark from Harry hints at a predatory nature that goes far beyond the boundaries of their marriage.

Draco Malfoy hates Hermione Granger-Weasley, wife of Ron Weasley, but he also lusts and obsesses after her, and he decides he's going to have her no matter what, even if he needs to resort to illegal magic and potions in order to have her, and he doesn't care what she thinks about it. Angst/Tragedy/Crime/Drama. Pairings: Draco and Hermione, Ron and Hermione, Draco and Ginny, Harry and Ginny. Rated for explicit sex scenes and non-con themes. STORY COMPLETE

Ginny and Harry have it all: a thriving investment business, a beautiful home, and a wonderful daughter, Lily. Their lives are organized, professional, and predictable—until they hire Angelina. Young, sweet, and undeniably captivating, Angelina immediately brings a warm energy into their household. How it would transformed them....

Reflections. -:- By: Wilde_Guess
calendar_add_on Published: Jul 21, 2024
update Updated: Apr 17, 2026
star Rated: Adult ++
book Chapters: 4
rate_review Reviews: 0
visibility Views: 2,366
recommend Recommendations: 0
menu_book Currently Reading: 0
Located: Harry Potter » General
David John Michael Daniel Dvorak and David John Rush-Cook Dvorak were two almost twelve-year-old boys living in Interesting Times in parallel universes. They were never supposed to be aware of the other's existence, until something swapped them to each other's world. How is a boy unknown outside of one Chicago suburb supposed to be a champion for the Chosen One? And how is a boy who had never left Illinois and only heard of magic the morning he woke up in Surrey supposed to protect the Boy Who Lived? (This is a character study based on other stories I'm writing. There is a plot, though.
Content Tags:
3Plus Abuse Anal Bi Exhib Fingering HC HJ MF MiCD Minor1 Minor2 MM OC Oral Other Rim Solo Violence
Needing This Moment -:- By: moviefan
calendar_add_on Published: Jul 30, 2025
update Updated: Mar 26, 2026
star Rated: Adult +
book Chapters: 1
rate_review Reviews: 2
visibility Views: 11,324
recommend Recommendations: 0
menu_book Currently Reading: 1
Located: Harry Potter » Het - Male/Female » Harry/Hermione

A missing scene from Deathly Hallows Part 1 between Harry and Hermione, where things progress further after their dance in the tent. After Ron's departure, Harry and Hermione are close to their breaking points. Feeling dispirited, they end up turning to each other for comfort to remind each other that the world isn't as dark and hopeless as it seems.


Hurt Comfort/Drama/Angst/Friendship/Romance. Pairings Harry and Hermione. Hermione and Ron. Harry and Ginny. COMPLETE
